reference: Hello Doctor, I am twenty-six years old. The doctor suggested a follicular study. The scan on the 10th day reported that the left ovary is normal, but the right ovary has a six millimeter dominant follicle. My question is, is it difficult to conceive with one normal ovary? Also, does the follicle size increase day by day?
text: Hello, doctor. I am 26 years old. The doctor suggested a follicular study. The scan on the 10th day reported that the left ovary is normal, but the right ovary has a 6mm dominant follicle. My question is, is it difficult to conceive with one normal ovary? Also, does the follicle size increase day by day?
